uk-legal.title: UK Legal
uk-legal.description: UK case law (TNA Find Case Law), legislation (legislation.gov.uk), Hansard, Bills, Parliamentary Votes, Committees, HMRC guidance, and OSCOLA citation parsing.

uk-due-diligence.title: UK Due Diligence
uk-due-diligence.description: Companies House, Charity Commission, HMLR Land Registry, The Gazette (insolvency notices), and HMRC VAT register.

govuk.title: GOV.UK
govuk.description: GOV.UK content, guidance, organisations, and postcode-to-local-authority lookup.

Slack.title: Slack
Slack.description: Search messages, read channels, find discussions across your workspace.

Google Drive.title: Google Drive
Google Drive.description: Search, read, and fetch documents from Google Drive.

iManage.title: iManage
iManage.description: Governed iManage content connected to Claude — documents stay in iManage, access is permission-bound and auditable.

Definely.title: Definely
Definely.description: Live, deterministic access to contract structure — resolve definitions, validate cross-references, map dependencies, run structural diffs.
